episodes.title: Join us for the theatrical premiere of Welcome Space Brothers TONIGHT
episodes.description: during our special one-night screening at The Alex Theatre ✨Featuring a music performance from @moby and surprise guests, and a post-screening Q&A with director Jodi Willie and students of Unarius moderated by Daniel Noah from @SpectreVision . Cosmic afterparty with DJ Chris Holmes 🎶 Doors are at 5:30pm with DJ and bar. Come early!

episodes.title: TRANSMISSION RECEIVED: Depicting captured memories of Interplanetary Confederation Day, circa 1981
episodes.description: Video from The Unarius Academy of Science archive.

episodes.title: We had the pleasure of showing some seniors Welcome Space Brothers and hearing their thoughts 💭
episodes.description: See what they’re talking about during our special premiere at The Alex Theatre tomorrow night! Tickets at welcomespacebrothers.com

episodes.title: Welcome Space Brothers - Official Trailer
episodes.description:
The trailer has landed!

A feature documentary on Unarius and Archangel Uriel, directed by Jodi Wille. 

Landing just in time for our theatrical premiere at the Alex Theater in Glendale on Saturday, June 13!

Please come out to see Welcome Space Brothers with Moby and the Unarius choir performing live onstage and celebrate the launch of our theatrical roadshow across America this summer.

Love is the greatest power in the universe.

Tickets at link in bio.
